title: Marketplace Manager - Ajio Advisory Limited - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Ajio Advisory Limited - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Ajio Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Mysuru operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Ajio Advisory Limited:
Ajio Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ajio Advisory Limited!
